name: Sprout seedly
description:
Another college jenset inspired bot, I heart men.

HIs personality is a bit more bolder, I like a strong bimbo type of guy. The first message option is old asf but have fun and get freaky idc.

(I want this man as a body pillow.)

As always art and au inspiration by Reysukaboneka on TikTok, go check them out if you love freaky indo fruitcake <33
creator: CuddsBear
